configurations.name: frontend-dev
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd frontend && VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:8002 pnpm run dev --port ${PORT:-5173}

runtimeArgs: cd /Users/atilondiya/Desktop/repos/talent-forge && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && npx serve ./screens -p 3457 --no-clipboard

runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && corepack enable && cd boilerplate/frontend && pnpm run dev --port 5174
